creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text: Mat is correct that this is not needed for poudriere. Yuri is correct that this is useful for people who are working on ports on a system with nvidia-driver present. While this addition may only benefit a minority, I see no harm in it and it should be a net positive for ports quality. However, to be complete it should also handle libEGL-NVIDIA.so and libGLESv2-NVIDIA.so in a similar fashion.
